overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character exploring a cozy, plant-filled medieval common room with wooden architecture, interacting with NPCs and moving through vaulted corridors into a bedroom area. The environment features warm lighting, potted plants, and ornate wooden furniture.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a cozy, plant-filled common room with warm lighting. NPCs relax on striped sofas while the camera moves past a central coffee table toward the right side of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: perimeter walkway with portrait gallery and bookshelves

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the wall past a gallery of framed portraits and a tall bookshelf. An NPC sits in an orange armchair to the right as the camera approaches the corner of the room.

turns around and walks back toward the main hall
passes through large circular archway into elevated corridor

segments.scene_description: The character explores the corner near a wooden staircase where a ghostly figure stands, then turns back and walks through a large archway into an elevated area of the common room.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, vaulted corridor illuminated by wall sconces. The stone and wood architecture creates an enclosed passage leading to a bedroom doorway.

turns around and exits bedroom back to corridor

tall wooden cabinet with carved doors

arched window with decorative stained glass panels

segments.scene_description: The character enters a well-lit bedroom featuring a four-poster bed, wooden wardrobe, and study desk near a stained glass window. After exploring the room, the character turns and exits back into the vaulted corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cozy, plant-filled common room that transitions from a social living area into a quiet, elevated corridor. It begins by gliding past NPCs relaxing on striped sofas and a central coffee table, bathed in warm, inviting light. As the camera moves along the perimeter, the scene shifts past a gallery of framed portraits and a tall bookshelf, passing an NPC seated in an orange armchair. The movement then carries the character toward a wooden staircase where a ghostly figure lingers in the corner, before finally turning back to pass through a large archway into an elevated section of the room.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed passage into a bright private chamber before returning to the corridor. It begins by following the character through a narrow, vaulted corridor where wall sconces cast a soft glow against the stone and wood architecture. As the character reaches the end of the passage, the scene opens into a well-lit bedroom featuring a four-poster bed, a wooden wardrobe, and a study desk positioned near a stained glass window. After exploring the interior of the room, the camera turns away from the sunlight and retreats back through the doorway. The shot finally concludes as the character exits the bedroom and re-enters the shadowed atmosphere of the vaulted corridor.
